g.text: Coupon System on Shopping Cart (Annotated for Interview)

in sequence. If any fails, reject immediately."

a coupon, is this one stackable?"

Pattern: Chain of Responsibility | OCP, SRP

coupons for this cart. How to sort them?"

validates: active? not expired? cart >= minValue? usage limit OK?

The Decorator on Strategy is the interview differentiator."
User enters coupon code, calls CouponService.applyCoupon()
Cart has items (Product + quantity), subtotal, category info
Coupon: type, value, maxDiscount, minCart, categories, expiry, limits
Active? Expired? MinCart? UsageLimit? Category? Stackable?
CategoryFilter + BrandFilter + MaxCap layered on strategy
Suggest best coupon: MaxSavings / Popularity ranking
Usage tracking, analytics, price update on apply/remove
